use_cases: Display download completion status to users after file downloads finish
Show installation confirmation messages in application interfaces
Provide non-intrusive feedback for background download processes
Notify users of successful content acquisition in media applications
ai_summary: A download toast notification component featuring an animated grid background and dark/light theme toggle support. This feedback component displays download status and installation confirmations with a modern, minimalist aesthetic. Ideal for SaaS platforms and applications requiring user-facing download progress or completion indicators.
